generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab from "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance ControllerAngleOutputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerAngleOutput
]

// C10: Data (raw and derived)
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position measurement r_M from the motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position measurement r_G from the gearbox encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current I_M measured by the current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AngleOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle r_out produced by the robot controller",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerAngleOutputDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque calculated from current and position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity computed from encoder position differences",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerAngleOutputDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration obtained from velocity data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated static, kinetic and viscous friction coefficients for the gearbox"
]

instance MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of improved motion accuracy resulting from friction compensation"
]

instance DataProvenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trace linking data values back to the specific sensor and MQTT transmission"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust controller algorithms in the robot controller based on identified friction parameters",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction in the gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of derived friction parameters and motion accuracy on a unified dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlParameterAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based adaptation of controller parameters using identified friction data",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its originating sensor and transmission event",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProvenanceInsight
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML toolchain used for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for executing simulation and friction‑identification models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterAdaptationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that streams live sensor measurements to the digital shadow",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking SysML and Simulink models with runtime data",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterAdaptationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for real‑time visualization of friction parameters and motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C10: Models / Data calculation models
instance SysMLMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor in the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram describing the gearwheel and cycloidal gearboxes",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model representing frictionless behavior of the gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model used for dynamic identification",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl model for static friction characterization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre model capturing pre‑slip behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model that computes torque from current and position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance VelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model that derives angular velocity and acceleration from encoder data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearwheel gearbox of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor providing input current I_M to the motor drive",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerAngleOutput : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller delivering output angle (r_out) for the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerAngleOutputDataTransmitted
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; data are processed and visualized as they are received from the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose class (FrictionDerivation), an Asset class (Mabi), Sources (physical sensors), DataTraces (measured and simulated), Processing components that run simulation models, and Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) linked together to provide friction analysis for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the design stage (engineering SysML models of structure), the simulation stage (Simulink friction models), and the operational stage (real‑time digital shadow during robot usage), thereby representing as‑designed, as‑simulated and as‑operated phases of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing model ensures that the generated friction estimates are verifiable; continuous identification accommodates wear and changing operating conditions, providing up‑to‑date model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over the MQTT protocol; the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) provides the semantic linkage between data and models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for representing the asset and its data, aligning with Industry 4.0 specification."
]
